title: how-it-works.html
text:
How it works
how it works
Your police check in just six easy steps
01
Start Your Application
Enter your personal details and choose the purpose of your
 check. The process is quick and fully guided from start to
 finish.
02
Verify account
You'll receive a verification code by email. Enter it to
 confirm your identity and continue your application
 securely.
03
Make Your Payment
Complete payment quickly and easily on a single secure
 pageâno redirects or unnecessary steps.
04
Enter History Details
Fill in your address history and other required background
 information accurately to proceed with your police check.
05
Verify Identity with TrueVault
Complete a quick identity check in minutes using a secure
 verification flow. Your identity is verified instantly
 using privacy-first, source-verified checksâwithout
 storing ID documents.
06
Submit and Get Results
Review your application and submit. Most checks are
 completed in minutes, with results emailed instantly in a
 secure, official certificate.
TrueVault
Effortless, fast, and privacy-first identity verification
Instant Identity Verification
Verify identity in real-time with a secure, seamless flow.
 Reduce manual checks and speed up onboarding without
 adding friction.
Skip Storing Identity Documents
No need to collect or retain passports or
 licencesâTrueVault verifies at source and returns only
 whatâs needed.
Streamlined For All Users
A simple, guided process anyone can complete quickly.
 Built to improve completion rates while keeping privacy
 and control central.
Identity Documents
Minimum identity documents required
You must provide three documents to confirm your identity.
 Validex will use these documents to verify your identity with

title: how-it-works.html
text:
identity documents required
You must provide three documents to confirm your identity.
 Validex will use these documents to verify your identity with
 the Personal Information you provided. The Personal
 Information contained in your identity documents will be used
 to conduct a Nationally Coordinated Criminal History Check
 (police check).
The documentation you provide must include evidence of your
 full legal name, date of birth and a photograph of you. Most
 people use a Passport, Drivers's Licence, and Medicare Card
 but other options are available.
Commencement Documents
Australian passport
Current Australian passport, including Ordinary,
 Frequent traveler, Diplomatic, Official and Emergency.
Australian birth certificate
Australian birth certificate or authorised record of
 birth (not an extract or birth card).
Australian Citizenship Certificate
Australian citizenship certificate issued in the
 Individual's name or former name by the Department of
 Home Affairs.
Australian visa
Australian visa (supported by a foreign passport,
 which is needed for verification).
Immi Card
Immi Card issued by the Department of Home Affairs.
Primary Documents
Australian passport
Current Australian passport, including Ordinary,
 Frequent traveler, Diplomatic, Official and Emergency.
Australian driver's licence
Australian driverâs licence, learner permit or
 provisional licence issued by a State or Territory,
 showing signature and/or photo.
Immi Card
Immi Card issued by the Department of Home Affairs.
Foreign passport
Foreign passport issued by a country other than
 Australia with a valid visa or valid entry stamp or
 equivalent.
Proof of age or photo identity card
Proof of age or photo identity card issued by an
 Australian government agency which shows the name,
 date of birth,

text:
Australia with a valid visa or valid entry stamp or
 equivalent.
Proof of age or photo identity card
Proof of age or photo identity card issued by an
 Australian government agency which shows the name,
 date of birth, photo and signature of the individual.
Secondary Documents
Australian driver's licence
Australian driverâs licence, learner permit or
 provisional licence issued by a State or Territory,
 showing signature and/or photo.
Medicare card
Medicare card issued by Services Australia.
Australian Aviation security ID card
Australian Aviation security identification card.
Australian Maritime security ID card
Australian Maritime security identification card.
Australian Firearms licence
Australian Firearms licence
Government benefit or Centrelink
Evidence of right to a government Centrelink benefit

title: www.afp.gov.au
text:
Crimes we're combatting
Antisemitism
Investigating threats, violence and hatred towards the Australian Jewish community and parliamentarians.
Hate crime
Protecting Australians from hatred, discrimination and prejudice.
Airports and aviation crime
We keep travellers, Australian airports, and other Australian interests safe.
Terrorism
Terrorism poses serious threats and challenges to Australia. We play a lead role in keeping Australians safe from terrorism.
Drug crime
Stopping the supply of illegal drugs to Australia, detecting and disrupting anyone who imports or exports border-controlled drugs.
Serious and organised crime
Combating serious and organised crime to protect the physical and financial security of Australia.
Money laundering and financial crime
Protecting the security and safety of the Australian economy, people and businesses.
Fraud and corruption
Working with our partners in Australia and overseas to stamp out fraud and corruption against the Commonwealth of Australia.
Illegal firearms and weapons
Investigating the possession and use of illegal firearms and weapons in Australia.
Human trafficking and people smuggling
Identifying and disrupting people and crime syndicates who commit crimes involving human exploitation.
Espionage and foreign interference
Working to prevent serious threats to our national interests and protect the Australian way of life.
Cybercrime
Combatting a serious criminal threat to Australia and Australians.
Crimes against children
We target child exploitation offenders and remove children from harm.
Breaches of international law
Investigating people, groups and countries that violate human rights.
Crimes against the Commonwealth of Australia
Investigating offences against Australia and its external territories.
Our global network
